hooks.command: jq -c '{ts: now | todate, session: .session_id, tool: .tool_name, file: (.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // null)}' >> ~/.finance/input-log.jsonl 2>/dev/null || true
[ -f ~/.finance/input-log.jsonl ] && COUNT=$(wc -l < ~/.finance/input-log.jsonl) && echo "{\"systemMessage\": \"📥 Finance data saved — $COUNT entries logged to ~/.finance/input-log.jsonl\"}" || true
